node.text: Dave's hands are permanently stained with grease from working on cars, showing his dedication and hard work.

node.text: Dave is passionate about fixing up things and finds it a source of achievement and purpose.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "car restoration sale") on Session 7 (Score: 0.64)

node.text: Working on cars is like therapy for Dave and a way to get away from everyday stress. He sees it as more than a hobby, but a passion.
Dave's job involves taking something broken and making it into something awesome.
Restoring things can be tough for Dave, but the feeling of accomplishment it gives him is great.
Dave helped his neighbor fix a car engine which he found a therapeutic and relaxing experience.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "car restoration sale") on Session 7 (Score: 0.64)

node.text: Dave restored and modified a car himself, adding a custom exhaust and performance upgrades.
Dave loves working with mechanics and sharing his knowledge about cars.
Dave believes that working on projects together brings people closer.
